evals.prompt: Business type is services. Here is one month: cash 180000, revenue 95000, opex 78000, cogs 12000, previous month revenue 90000. Give me health metrics.
evals.expected_output: Common metrics computed and SaaS-only metrics marked insufficient_data with missing_inputs.

evals.prompt: Business type is SaaS. Cash 1200000, revenue 60000, opex 180000, cogs 15000, prev month revenue 52000, S&M 40000, new customers 8, active customers 120, lost customers 3, starting_mrr 58000, churned_mrr 1500, expansion_mrr 2400, contraction_mrr 300, arr_start 650000, arr_end 720000, revenue_growth_yoy_pct 140, operating_margin_pct -180.
evals.expected_output: All advanced metrics computed with labels and no invented values.

evals.prompt: I uploaded only a bank CSV from one month and did not provide business type.
evals.expected_output: Parser-derived common metrics + request for business type + insufficient_data for non-derivable advanced metrics.
